hooks.command: TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); DIR='local-workspace/sessions'; cd "$(git -C . rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && ls $DIR/${TODAY}-*.md 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo 'ACTION REQUIRED: No session note exists for today. Create local-workspace/sessions/${TODAY}-HHmm-slug.md now, before writing more files.'

REPO=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$REPO" ] && cd "$REPO" && git add local-workspace/ && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'chore: auto-save session work [skip ci]' && git push origin HEAD --quiet 2>&1 || true
